## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content production, workflow updates, and AI-driven innovations.](https://fathom.video/share/U8XzdMQCosnXidxxBWBzhsx_W_t4mmTD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Account transition: Ehtisham and Darrell taking over from Jakub for Sunbit account](https://fathom.video/share/U8XzdMQCosnXidxxBWBzhsx_W_t4mmTD?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [25 new B2C articles ready for review across auto and dental categories](https://fathom.video/share/U8XzdMQCosnXidxxBWBzhsx_W_t4mmTD?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [WordPress publishing automation in progress, estimated completion mid-August](https://fathom.video/share/U8XzdMQCosnXidxxBWBzhsx_W_t4mmTD?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Social media workflow automation to be revisited and updated based on previous feedback](https://fathom.video/share/U8XzdMQCosnXidxxBWBzhsx_W_t4mmTD?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [Gradual rollout of backlogged content recommended to avoid potential Google penalties](https://fathom.video/share/U8XzdMQCosnXidxxBWBzhsx_W_t4mmTD?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)

## Topics

### Account Transition
